iti1:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti1:1.3: "Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return. Which one quality?
iti1:1.4:
Abandon greed as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return."
This is the meaning of what the Blessed One said. So with regard to this it was said:
iti1:1.5:
The greed with which beings
Go to a bad destination,
coveting:
From rightly discerning that greed,
Those who see clearly let go. Letting go,
They never come to this world again.
iti1:1.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
